description.name: OwnPay Payment Gateway
description.tagline: Accept payments via OwnPay hosted checkout with 130+ gateways.
description.long: OwnPay is an enterprise-grade payment gateway platform that supports 130+ payment methods worldwide. Customers are redirected to a secure hosted checkout page to complete payment, then returned to your WHMCS installation. Features include real-time webhook notifications, full and partial refunds, transaction details in the admin area, and comprehensive security with HMAC-SHA256 webhook verification.
features: Hosted checkout with 130+ payment gateway support
Transaction information display in admin area
Test mode with detailed API logging
